status.sql: SELECT f."osm_id", COUNT(DISTINCT n."id") AS "total_amenity_pois" FROM "GEO_OPENSTREETMAP"."PLANET_FEATURES" f JOIN "GEO_OPENSTREETMAP"."PLANET_NODES" n ON ST_WITHIN(n."geometry", f."geometry") WHERE f."feature_type" = 'administrative_boundary' AND n."all_tags" ILIKE '%amenity%' GROUP BY f."osm_id"
solved_subquestions_list: Count the number of amenity-tagged Points of Interest (POIs) for each administrative boundary.

status.sql: SELECT f.osm_id, COUNT(DISTINCT n.id) AS total_amenity_pois FROM GEO_OPENSTREETMAP.PLANET_FEATURES f JOIN GEO_OPENSTREETMAP.PLANET_NODES n ON ST_WITHIN(n.geometry::GEOGRAPHY, f.geometry::GEOGRAPHY) WHERE f.feature_type = 'administrative_boundary' AND n.all_tags ILIKE '%amenity%' GROUP BY f.osm_id
solved_subquestions_list: Count the number of amenity-tagged Points of Interest (POIs) for each administrative boundary.
